**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Xinjin Electronic Technology Co., Ltd. presents a clear case of a trading proxy officially misclassified as an electronics manufacturer. Despite its official industry tag of 'Electronic Device Manufacturing' and its singular claim of 'Manufacturing Power Electronic Components', the Dual-Veto engine immediately flags a severe demographic paradox. The entity operates with a micro-footprint of only 1 insured employee in 2024. While it has a fully paid-in capital of 3 million RMB and an industrial zone address (No. 5 Heling Road), a 1-person operation cannot physically execute industrial-scale manufacturing of power electronics. A closer look at its business scope reveals that 95% of its listed activities are 'sales' and 'wholesale' of highly specialized equipment (IC chips, PV equipment, smart switchgear). It is decisively reclassified as a 1-person, well-capitalized trading proxy and sales agency, functioning entirely as a distributor for high-tech electrical and electronic components.
